name: hivemind
description: Cloud-backed persistent memory powered by Deeplake — read, write, and share memory across Codex sessions and agents

interface.shortDescription: Persistent shared memory for AI agents powered by Deeplake
interface.longDescription: Captures all session activity and provides cross-session, cross-agent memory search via ~/.deeplake/memory/. Memory is stored in Deeplake managed tables and shared across sessions, users, and agents in your organization.
